name: Proxy Flower Bowl
summary: Proxy Flower Bowl — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Proxy flower bowl by Puffco allows for the utilization of any Proxy glass piece or accessory for flower, with a tight and secure plug-in attachment. This versatile bowl makes every Proxy flower enthusiast's collection complete - turning anything into a pipe for the smoking experience. *Proxy base unit not included A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
